items.name: QuantEdge-AI
items.description: A machine learning framework for identifying high-probability trading opportunities using technical market structure and price action

items.name: CHHO-GSA-for-Voice-Based-Parkinson-s-Disease-Detection
items.description: CHHO-GSA is a hybrid feature selection framework for early Parkinson’s Disease detection using voice data. It combines Chaotic Harris Hawks Optimization (CHHO) and the Gravitational Search Algorithm (GSA) to select optimal acoustic features and improve classification performance using machine learning models.

items.name: TCAD-Inspired-FinFET-Modeling-Performance-Prediction-and-Power-Optimization-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: TCAD-inspired FinFET modeling and optimization framework using Machine Learning. Predicts drain current (Id), delay, and power consumption with Random Forest Regression, provides interactive design exploration, and performs PAL-based optimization for low-power device configurations.

items.name: tensorflow-federated
items.description: An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

items.name: OptimML-Framework
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework that automates model selection and hyperparameter optimization using genetic algorithms and exhaustive search methods. Features an interactive Streamlit dashboard for visualizing model performance, comparing algorithms, and exporting results to Excel.

items.name: network-attack-defence-framework
items.description: A two-phase machine learning framework featuring an adversarial attack fuzzer and defensive hardening loop evaluated against the CICIDS2017 dataset.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: awesome-ml-engineering
items.description: A curated list of tools, frameworks, platforms, research, workflows, and learning resources for Machine Learning Engineering.

items.name: quant-automl-thesis
items.description: Evaluation and benchmarking of automated machine learning (AutoML) frameworks for financial forecasting and stock market trend prediction in Python. Features data labeling, classification, and regression tasks using AutoGluon, FLAML, MLJAR, and H2O.

items.name: financial-sentiment-network-intelligence
items.description: A research framework integrating FinBERT, social network analysis, PageRank-based influence modeling, and machine learning for stock trend prediction using 3.6M+ financial tweets.

items.name: thor
items.description: THOR is a client-side malicious webpage detection framework that uses sandboxed web data collection, global feature engineering, and machine learning to detect malicious URLs and QR-code-linked pages.

items.name: Structural-Health-Monitoring-Bridge-Digital-Twin-using-Machine-Learning
items.description: The project combines unsupervised learning, supervised learning, and civil engineering domain knowledge to create an interpretable bridge monitoring framework.

items.name: Algo-Artha
items.description: Algo-artha is a comprehensive machine learning framework designed to bridge the gap between material science and economic forecasting. This project leverages advanced ensemble modeling to predict material properties, assess structural stability, and forecast commodity price fluctuations to facilitate data-driven inverse design.

items.name: Autonomous-Blast-PPV-Prediction
items.description: Autonomous hybrid machine learning framework for accurate prediction of blast-induced ground vibration (PPV) in surface mining operations.

items.name: Credence--Credit-Risk-
items.description: CREDENCE is an explainable and fairness-aware credit scoring framework that combines machine learning, responsible AI, and regulatory compliance to deliver transparent and ethical lending decisions. It integrates predictive modeling, SHAP explainability, fairness optimization, and risk-based decision engines to support accurate, interpretable.

items.name: salidroside-ml-prioritization
items.description: Data and code for a machine-learning framework prioritizing salidroside-positive plant species.

items.name: aisaxs
items.description: AI-SAXS: differentiable machine-learning framework for SAXS analysis of lipid nanoparticles.

items.name: SDB-Diffusion-Framework
items.description: A Robust Computational Framework for Satellite-Derived Bathymetry Integrating Machine Learning with Spatio-Temporal Generative Diffusion Models

items.name: Threat-Detection-Using-Machine-Learning-Techniques
items.description: Threat detection using machine learning techniques built using python django framework as backend and mysqlite3 for database.

items.name: NumCompute_v2
items.description: A modular, streaming-compatible ensemble tree-based machine learning framework using plain Python + NumPy

items.name: aiko_services
items.description: Distributed service framework using asynchronous messages supporting IoT, Machine Learning and Video

items.name: T2D-islet-ML-panel
items.description: Reproducible repository for the machine-learning and external-validation components of the paper "Transcriptomic Architecture of Type 2 Diabetes in Human Pancreatic Islets: An Integrative Meta-Analysis and Machine Learning Framework for Biomarker Discovery"

items.name: Gold-Price-Prediction
items.description: A machine learning-based framework for analyzing historical gold price trends and forecasting future gold prices through data preprocessing, feature engineering, visualization, and model evaluation.

items.name: vuln-correlation-framework
items.description: A lightweight, interpretable machine‑learning framework that correlates findings from multiple SAST and DAST tools to reduce false positives and prioritize true vulnerabilities.

items.name: Artificial-Intelligence-Resources
items.description: A curated collection of high-quality learning materials, research papers, datasets, frameworks, and practical guides covering every major area of Artificial Intelligence — including Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Generative AI, Reinforcement Learning, and MLOps.

items.name: eldum
items.description: A machine learning framework

items.name: kaggle-competitions-portfolio
items.description: This repository contains my end-to-end solutions for various Kaggle competitions, showcasing data preprocessing, exploratory analysis, model training, and performance evaluation using Python and machine learning frameworks.

items.name: Model-Stealing-Detection-System
items.description: A comprehensive research and educational framework for detecting model stealing attempts in machine learning systems. This project demonstrates various detection techniques, defense mechanisms, and evaluation metrics for protecting ML models from unauthorized replication.

items.name: Explainable-AutoML
items.description: A comprehensive framework for automated machine learning with interpretability, combining TPOT (AutoML) with multiple explainability methods including SHAP, LIME, and Integrated Gradients.

items.name: AutoML-Implementation
items.description: A comprehensive AutoML (Automated Machine Learning) implementation featuring multiple algorithms, evaluation frameworks, and interactive demos for research and educational purposes.

items.name: Evolutionary-Algorithms-for-AI
items.description: A comprehensive research and educational framework for evolutionary algorithms applied to hyperparameter optimization in machine learning.

items.name: Interactive-Machine-Learning
items.description: A comprehensive framework for interactive machine learning that allows users to actively participate in the learning process through feedback and corrections. This project demonstrates various active learning strategies and provides both programmatic and interactive interfaces for experimentation.

items.name: Feature-Importance-XAI-Project
items.description: This project provides a comprehensive framework for feature importance visualization and analysis in machine learning models. It implements multiple state-of-the-art methods for global interpretability including permutation importance, SHAP, SAGE, and stability analysis.

items.name: AI-Transparency-Tools
items.description: A comprehensive Explainable AI (XAI) toolkit focused on post-hoc global and local explanations for machine learning models. This project provides state-of-the-art interpretability methods with proper evaluation frameworks and interactive demonstrations.

items.name: Red-Teaming-for-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for adversarial robustness testing and red teaming of machine learning models. This project implements various adversarial attacks, robustness evaluation metrics, and visualization tools to assess the security and reliability of AI systems.

items.name: Decision-Tree-Extraction-from-Black-Box-Models
items.description: Comprehensive framework for extracting interpretable decision trees from black-box machine learning models. This project focuses on **post-hoc local/global interpretability** through **rule/tree extraction** methods.

items.name: Model-Behavioral-Testing-Framework
items.description: A comprehensive framework for model behavioral testing that evaluates machine learning models across various scenarios, edge cases, and adversarial conditions. This project focuses on trust and safety aspects of AI systems through systematic behavioral evaluation.

items.name: Bias-Detection-in-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for detecting and assessing bias in machine learning models, designed for research and educational purposes.

items.name: 020_EDACASESTUDY
items.description: End-to-end Credit Risk Analytics pipeline and Loss Given Default (LGD) prediction model built on 2,000,000 retail loan records. Features data cleaning, winsorization, feature engineering, OLS diagnostics, and regularized machine learning frameworks.

items.name: EDA_FinSights
items.description: End-to-end Credit Risk Analytics pipeline and Loss Given Default (LGD) prediction model built on 2,000,000 retail loan records. Features data cleaning, winsorization, feature engineering, OLS diagnostics, and regularized machine learning frameworks.

items.name: 20_EDACASESTUDY
items.description: End-to-end Credit Risk Analytics pipeline and Loss Given Default (LGD) prediction model built on 2,000,000 retail loan records. Features data cleaning, winsorization, feature engineering, OLS diagnostics, and regularized machine learning frameworks.

items.name: PromptShield
items.description: PromptShield is an AI-powered cybersecurity framework that detects and classifies prompt injection and jailbreak attacks against Large Language Models (LLMs). It analyzes user prompts, identifies potential threats, explains risks, and enhances the security of AI applications using machine learning.

items.name: Sustainability-AI-Project
items.description: Advanced machine learning frameworks for industrial decarbonization, multi-tier supply chain topology modeling, and geospatial self-supervised learning.

items.name: Battery-PIAI-ECM
items.description: This repository contains the implementation of a physics-informed experimental and machine learning framework for lithium-ion battery degradation analysis using equivalent circuit modeling (ECM) and NASA prognostics datasets.

items.name: Neural-Network-Tournament-Forecaster
items.description: A machine learning tournament framework that automatically trains, evaluates, benchmarks, and ranks competing neural network architectures for financial time-series forecasting using train, mock-exam, and final-exam evaluation stages.

items.name: Physics-Informed-Explainable-Machine-Learning-for-Hardness-Prediction-in-High-Entropy-Alloys
items.description: Physics-informed and explainable machine learning framework for hardness prediction in high-entropy alloys. Includes dataset curation, descriptor engineering, baseline and descriptor-based ML models, SHAP interpretability, digital material card generation, ANSYS input preparation, fatigue assessment, and FEM validation workflows.

items.name: Quantum-AI-Benchmarking-Platform
items.description: A comparative benchmarking framework for Classical and Quantum Machine Learning algorithms (QSVM, VQC, QNN) across Digital Transformation use cases including Predictive Maintenance, Financial Fraud Detection, and Customer Churn Prediction.

items.name: AI_ENGINEER_INTERNSHIP
items.description: A collection of internship projects focused on Artificial Intelligence, including machine learning models, deep learning architectures, natural language processing, computer vision, prompt engineering, and AI-powered application development. Built using Python and modern AI frameworks.

items.name: Event-Ticket-Purchase-Analytics-and-Predictive-Framework
items.description: Machine learning and data analytics project exploring 20,000+ festival ticket purchases. Analyzes customer behavior, pricing sensitivity, seasonal trends, and regional demand patterns through feature engineering, EDA, and predictive modeling to support event planning and revenue optimization.

items.name: random_forest_XCI
items.description: hESC and GM12878 pipelines for Integrative long-read sequencing, RNA-seq and machine learning framework characterizes and predicts autosomal silencing in unbalanced X-autosome translocations

items.description: Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Predicting Student Burnout and Academic Risk using behavioral data, machine learning models, and Explainable AI (SHAP & LIME) to enable early intervention and improve student success.

items.name: GA-Breast-Cancer-Diagnosis
items.description: An explainable machine learning framework for breast cancer diagnosis using Genetic Algorithm (GA)-based feature selection, Support Vector Machine (SVM) classification, and SHAP explainability.

items.name: EdgeSign-An-IoT-Enabled-Edge-Cloud-Hybrid-System-for-Real-Time
items.description: EdgeSign: An IoT-Enabled Edge–Cloud  Hybrid System for Real-Time Sign Language Translation. The system captures hand gestures  using a camera connected to a Raspberry Pi and extracts hand landmarks using the MediaPipe  framework. These landmarks are processed using a machine learning model to recognize  predefined gestures.

items.name: Athlete-performance-forecasting
items.description: Machine learning framework for athlete talent evaluation and draft outcome prediction using collegiate performance analytics.

items.description: Companion repository to:  Romero R. "Transcriptomic Architecture of Type 2 Diabetes in Human Pancreatic Islets: An Integrative Meta-Analysis and Machine Learning Framework for Biomarker Discovery."

items.name: Data_Preprocessing_Library
items.description: An installable Python packaging framework designed to automate machine learning data preprocessing.

items.name: SecurTalent-AI
items.description: Unsupervised machine learning framework and deterministic low-level metadata parsing engine designed to mitigate adversarial text injection vulnerabilities in automated data processing channels.

items.name: cosmicml-biodetect
items.description: CosmicML-Biodetect is a machine learning framework for analyzing exoplanet  atmospheres using transmission spectroscopy data. It implements Physics-Informed  Neural Networks (PINNs) that enforce atmospheric physics constraints during  training, enabling detection of biosignature gases (O₂, CH₄, O₃) from  spectroscopic observations.

items.name: A-Lightweight-Supervised-ML-Framework-for-Near-Zero-False-Positive-Network-Anomaly-Detection
items.description: This repository contains a high-precision, machine learning-based framework for detecting network intrusions using the NSL-KDD dataset. The project implements a unique preprocessing-consistent pipeline designed to maximize operational reliability and reduce "alert fatigue" in resource-constrained environments.

items.name: Anaemia-Type-Prediction
items.description: This project predicts the type of Anaemia in patients using machine learning techniques, specifically the XGBoost algorithm and a Sacking Ensemble Classifier.. After preprocessing the data , we apply XGBoost—a powerful gradient boosting framework known for its accuracy and efficiency—as a base model.

items.name: Hybrid-Econometric-SEM-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Agricultural-Technology-Adoption-in-Nigeria
items.description: This study develops a hybrid econometric–SEM–machine learning framework to analyze adoption of indigenous agricultural machinery among smallholder farmers in Niger State, Nigeria. Results show adoption is driven by awareness, perceived benefits, ease of use, and farm size, supporting scalable financing strategies.

items.name: FRIS-Predictive-Risk-Framework
items.description: Financial Risk Intelligence System (FRIS): A modular machine learning framework developed for New England College to predict student loan default risk, optimize institutional retention, and ensure federal compliance.

items.name: healthcare-data-quality-framework
items.description: Developed a reusable Pandas-based data quality framework for healthcare data that checks missing values, duplicates, implausible clinical value ranges, inconsistent categories, date logic, and statistical outliers. Results are exported as Markdown and CSV reports to support analytics, BI, and machine learning workflows.

items.name: Yield-Prediction-
items.description: A hybrid quantitative finance model reconstructing the global yield curve using a calibrated Cox-Ingersoll-Ross (CIR) stochastic framework and a Machine Learning term premium extractor. Achieved an out-of-sample global R² of 0.86.

items.name: Interpretable-ML-Health-Data-Science
items.description: Implementing interpretable machine learning models and post-hoc explainability frameworks for predictive health data analytics.

Proyek ini diimplementasikan menggunakan algoritma *Machine Learning *Multinomial Naive Bayes* dan dideploy menggunakan framework *Streamlit*.

items.name: GeoAI-LULC-Classification
items.description: A GeoAI framework for Land Use Land Cover classification using Sentinel-2 data, feature engineering, and machine learning models including Random Forest, XGBoost, CART, and KNN.

items.description: A boundary condition–based machine learning (BCML) framework is developed for rarefied hypersonic flow-field prediction and mesh generation around re-entry bluff bodies. Trained on DSMC data, BCML predicts flow properties and generates mean-free-path-based meshes, reducing cell count and computational cost while maintaining accuracy."

items.name: Moontrace
items.description: A machine learning framework for Lua obfuscator attribution, structural fingerprinting, and AST-based code analysis.

items.description: Developed a machine learning framework to analyze and predict post-synthesis timing and power metrics from RTL designs using synthesis and static timing analysis data.
